# Pull Request

## 📌 Description
What does this PR change?

## 🧠 Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Architecture change
- [ ] Worker modification
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance improvement

## ⚙ System Impact
Explain how this affects:
- Orchestrator
- Workers
- Coordinators
- Runtime behavior

## 🔍 Testing
- [ ] Built successfully
- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] No regressions
- [ ] Deterministic behavior preserved

## 📦 Worker / Module Affected
List affected components.

## 🧠 Architecture Notes
Any structural changes or reasoning.

## ⚠ Breaking Changes
- Yes / No

If yes, describe.

## 📸 Evidence (if applicable)
Logs, screenshots, or output.
